title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for the Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 .  Here we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
